마태복음 9:1.content: He entered into a boat, and crossed over, and came into his own city.

마태복음 9:2.content: Behold, they brought to him a man who was paralyzed, lying on a bed. Jesus, seeing their faith, said to the paralytic, “Son, cheer up! Your sins are forgiven you.”

마태복음 9:3.content: Behold, some of the scribes said to themselves, “This man blasphemes.”

마태복음 9:4.content: Jesus, knowing their thoughts, said, “Why do you think evil in your hearts?

마태복음 9:5.content: For which is easier, to say, ‘Your sins are forgiven;’ or to say, ‘Get up, and walk?’

마태복음 9:6.content: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins-” (then he said to the paralytic), “Get up, and take up your mat, and go to your house.”

마태복음 9:7.content: He arose and departed to his house.

마태복음 9:8.content: But when the multitudes saw it, they marveled and glorified God, who had given such authority to men.

마태복음 9:9.content: As Jesus passed by from there, he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax collection office. He said to him, “Follow me.” He got up and followed him.

마태복음 9:10.content: As he sat in the house, behold, many tax collectors and sinners came and sat down with Jesus and his disciples.

마태복음 9:11.content: When the Pharisees saw it, they said to his disciples, “Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and sinners?”

마태복음 9:12.content: When Jesus heard it, he said to them, “Those who are healthy have no need for a physician, but those who are sick do.

마태복음 9:13.content: But you go and learn what this means: ‘I desire mercy, and not sacrifice,’ for I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.”

마태복음 9:14.content: Then John’s disciples came to him, saying, “Why do we and the Pharisees fast often, but your disciples don’t fast?”

마태복음 9:15.content: Jesus said to them, “Can the friends of the bridegroom mourn, as long as the bridegroom is with them? But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast.

마태복음 9:16.content: No one puts a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment; for the patch would tear away from the garment, and a worse hole is made.

마태복음 9:17.content: Neither do people put new wine into old wine skins, or else the skins would burst, and the wine be spilled, and the skins ruined. No, they put new wine into fresh wine skins, and both are preserved.”

마태복음 9:18.content: While he told these things to them, behold, a ruler came and worshiped him, saying, “My daughter has just died, but come and lay your hand on her, and she will live.”

마태복음 9:19.content: Jesus got up and followed him, as did his disciples.

마태복음 9:20.content: Behold, a woman who had a discharge of blood for twelve years came behind him, and touched the fringe of his garment;

마태복음 9:21.content: for she said within herself, “If I just touch his garment, I will be made well.”

마태복음 9:22.content: But Jesus, turning around and seeing her, said, “Daughter, cheer up! Your faith has made you well.” And the woman was made well from that hour.

마태복음 9:23.content: When Jesus came into the ruler’s house, and saw the flute players, and the crowd in noisy disorder,

마태복음 9:24.content: he said to them, “Make room, because the girl isn’t dead, but sleeping.” They were ridiculing him.

마태복음 9:25.content: But when the crowd was put out, he entered in, took her by the hand, and the girl arose.

마태복음 9:26.content: The report of this went out into all that land.

마태복음 9:27.content: As Jesus passed by from there, two blind men followed him, calling out and saying, “Have mercy on us, son of David!”

마태복음 9:28.content: When he had come into the house, the blind men came to him. Jesus said to them, “Do you believe that I am able to do this?” They told him, “Yes, Lord.”

마태복음 9:29.content: Then he touched their eyes, saying, “According to your faith be it done to you.”

마태복음 9:30.content: Their eyes were opened. Jesus strictly commanded them, saying, “See that no one knows about this.”

마태복음 9:31.content: But they went out and spread abroad his fame in all that land.

마태복음 9:32.content: As they went out, behold, a mute man who was demon possessed was brought to him.

마태복음 9:33.content: When the demon was cast out, the mute man spoke. The multitudes marveled, saying, “Nothing like this has ever been seen in Israel!”

마태복음 9:34.content: But the Pharisees said, “By the prince of the demons, he casts out demons.”

마태복음 9:35.content: Jesus went about all the cities and the villages, teaching in their synagogues, and preaching the Good News of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people.

마태복음 9:36.content: But when he saw the multitudes, he was moved with compassion for them, because they were harassed and scattered, like sheep without a shepherd.

마태복음 9:37.content: Then he said to his disciples, “The harvest indeed is plentiful, but the laborers are few.

마태복음 9:38.content: Pray therefore that the Lord of the harvest will send out laborers into his harvest.”
